# User Stories — Google Login Feature
**Artifact ID:** ART-PO-002  
**Workflow Run:** WR-001  
**Generated by:** PO Agent  
**Version:** 1.0

---

## US-001 — Đăng nhập bằng Google (Happy Path)
**As** an end user,  
**I want** to click "Sign in with Google" on the login page,  
**So that** I can log in without entering a separate username and password.

**Priority:** High  
**Acceptance Criteria:** AC-001, AC-002, AC-003

---

## US-002 — Xử lý Google Login thất bại
**As** an end user,  
**I want** to see a clear error message if my Google login fails,  
**So that** I understand what went wrong and can try again.

**Priority:** High  
**Acceptance Criteria:** AC-004, AC-005

---

## US-003 — Liên kết tài khoản Google với tài khoản hiện có
**As** an existing user with email/password login,  
**I want** to link my Google account from the Profile settings page,  
**So that** I can use either method to log in.

**Priority:** Medium  
**Acceptance Criteria:** AC-006, AC-007

---

## US-004 — Đăng nhập không làm hỏng flow email hiện có
**As** an existing user who logs in with email/password,  
**I want** the existing login flow to remain unchanged,  
**So that** my current workflow is not disrupted.

**Priority:** High  
**Acceptance Criteria:** AC-008

---

## US-005 — Cancel Google popup không gây lỗi
**As** an end user who changes their mind,  
**I want** to be able to close the Google login popup without any error,  
**So that** I can choose another login method.

**Priority:** Medium  
**Acceptance Criteria:** AC-009
